seoTitle: North Bondi vs North Bourke — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between North Bondi and North Bourke. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: North Bondi vs North Bourke: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in North Bondi and North Bourke.
heading: North Bondi vs North Bourke — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between North Bondi, New South Wales and North Bourke, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: North Bourke has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to North Bondi (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is North Bondi or North Bourke safer from flooding?
faq.answer: North Bondi has a flood risk score of 20/100, while North Bourke scores 56/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: North Bondi scores 45/100 for bushfire risk. North Bourke scores 24/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in North Bondi or North Bourke?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. North Bourke has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.03% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
